task.title: Add CLI launch command for Relayfile observer

events.content: Launch hosted observer with URL fragment config: Launch hosted observer with URL fragment config

raw.question: Launch hosted observer with URL fragment config
raw.chosen: Launch hosted observer with URL fragment config
raw.reasoning: The hosted observer cannot rely on per-user build-time NEXT_PUBLIC values. The CLI can pass server, workspace, and token at launch time in the URL fragment so credentials are available to browser code without being sent to the observer host as query parameters.

retrospective.summary: Added relayfile observer CLI launcher, runtime URL-fragment configuration for the hosted file observer, tests, docs, and ignored generated observer output.
